Denis Bogdanovskiy

Management • AI & Crypto • Leadership

3rd-year at Wydział Zarządzania UW. I build AI-powered products, manage teams, and solve complex problems. Polish C1+, English C1, Russian native.

Experience
2024 — Present

Vice President

Leaders for the Future — WZ UW

Strategic leadership of a leading 6-section academic club at WZ UW. Built the entire digital infrastructure — Notion workspace, Google Sheets dashboards, and automated member scoring via Apps Script. Organized fundraising for 20+ members. Crisis management, event coordination, team leadership, and AI masterclasses. leadersforthefuture.pl in active development.

2024 — Present

English Language Teacher

Tutlo Language School

20+ months teaching English across cultures, levels, and age groups. Sharpened communication, cross-cultural empathy, and the ability to distill complex ideas into simple language — with full passion and commitment. Directly transferable to any professional environment. Teaching is a craft I pursue with genuine love.

2020 — Present

AI & Automation Engineer

Freelance / Non-commercial – 7+ Innovative Projects

End-to-end product builder with top-notch AI instruments. Stack: CrewAI, Python, TypeScript, n8n, Supabase, Next.js, Binance API, Telegram API (Telethon), Gemini / Claude, Pinecone, Tavily, Apps Script, Google Cloud, LaTeX. That immerse package mastered gives me a full-throttle freedom on what can be done and how cheap and quick it is.

Why Work With Me

Business fundamentals from Poland's top university collide with raw AI execution. Pure pragmatism, no theory — I ship working products, automate flows, and command teams.

7 shipped products. 4 languages. Academic club leader. Available full-time/hybrid in Warsaw. Ready to disrupt? Let's start immediately. (Student <26 until 2026).

Contact
Contact

Education

Wydział Zarządzania, Uniwersytet Warszawski — Bachelor's in Management (graduating July 2026). Thesis on tokenization of digital assets (Telegram Gifts, TON blockchain, MiCA regulation). VP of one of the biggest science clubs at the University.

Professional Google Sheets with Apps Script & Excel. Proficient: n8n, Notion, Figma, Canva, Git, Terminal, Google Cloud, Cursor / Antigravity / IntelliJ IDE, CrewAI and much more.
